items.title: [100% Remoto] Product Owner na BotCity
items.description:
## Nossa empresa

BotCity is building the future of automation with the Governance Platform for Python automations and AI Agents. We empower enterprises to innovate at scale, bringing governance, control, and observability to every automation project. Our philosophy is simple: automation is software, and software deserves the same high-code standards that drive innovation in AI and machine learning.

We recently raised a $12M Series A, led by Four Rivers with participation from Y Combinator, SoftBank, and top industry leaders such as Lew Cirne (New Relic), Rod Johnson (Spring Source), and Walter Kortschak (Summit Partners | Firestreak Ventures). With 1,000+ customers in 70+ countries, including Bayer and LG, and recognition by G2 (2024) as one of the worldвЂ™s top 25 emerging platforms, BotCity is scaling fast.

WeвЂ™re a global remote company with teams across the US and LATAM, united by a shared vision to redefine how enterprises build and manage automation. If youвЂ™re looking for an environment that values impact, autonomy, and excellence, weвЂ™d love for you to join us on this journey.

## DescriГ§ГЈo da vaga

The Product Owner will be responsible for driving Sentinel's product execution by translating the CTO's strategic direction into a clear, well-prioritized backlog that keeps the engineering squad focused and moving fast toward product-market fit. This person will own the full execution layer вЂ” maintaining sprint-ready user stories, removing blockers in real time, and tracking the delivery metrics that drive continuous improvement in quality and predictability. This role is built for a strong product professional who is comfortable navigating ambiguity in an early-stage environment, obsessed with delivery quality, and data-driven enough to let metrics guide process decisions вЂ” not gut feel. This position reports directly to the CTO.

## 100% Remoto


## Requisitos

**ObrigatГіrios:**

- Bachelor's degree in Information Technology, Computer Science, Business, or related field.
- Prior experience (3+ years) in product ownership or a closely adjacent role in a tech company, ideally operating as the primary or sole PO on a product.
- Strong experience working in B2B SaaS market.
- Deep understanding of the software development lifecycle вЂ” from code changes flowing through development, staging, and production environments, through QA evaluation and release.
- Proven ability to independently own a full product backlog, including stories, acceptance criteria, dependencies and prioritization.
- Solid experience running Agile/Scrum methodologies.
- Proficient with Jira for project, backlog and sprint management.
- Prior experience in an early-stage, high-growth, and fast-paced startup environment.
- Experience working with MS Office/Excel, Google Suite, Notion.
- Ability to travel as needed to support events and meet the team.
- Portuguese - Fluent.
- English - Advanced.


**DesejГЎveis:**

- Exposure to enterprise software, automation, AI agents, or developer-facing products.
- Experience working directly with a CTO or VP Engineering as primary stakeholder.
- Familiarity with product analytics tools (e.g., Mixpanel, Amplitude, Metabase).
- Working familiarity with GitHub or version control workflows.


## Incentivos

- Competitive compensation.
- Paid time off (30 days per year).
- 100% remote and flexible hours.
- Caju benefits card.
- Conexa health benefits.
- Opportunity to work in a global team with teams in San Francisco and SГЈo Paulo.
- PolГ­tica de Time off
- Seguro de Vida


## ContrataГ§ГЈo

PJ a combinar

## Como se candidatar

Link para cadastro: https: //jobs.quickin.io/botcity/jobs/69e780cdb282430013fc5f8a?src=Github

items.description:
> рџ‡§рџ‡· Vaga 100% remota para profissionais baseados no Brasil. A funГ§ГЈo exige **inglГЄs fluente**, entГЈo o anГєncio estГЎ em inglГЄs de propГіsito вЂ” jГЎ serve como um primeiro filtro. / This role requires fluent English, so the listing is in English by design.

## Nossa empresa

Wrenly is a bootstrapped, profitable HR / people-analytics SaaS. We regularly go up against companies like Lattice and Culture Amp вЂ” companies that raised hundreds of millions of dollars вЂ” and we're winning. We meet teams where they already work: a performance review that arrives as a Slack message, a survey that's a ping in MS Teams. We're profitable, growing every month, and deliberately lean вЂ” we use AI to punch far above our headcount.

## DescriГ§ГЈo da vaga

**Founding Customer Success Manager (AI-first).**

One catch: you'll do this job with **AI as your primary tool** вЂ” not as a nice-to-have, but as the way you work. Claude will be how you triage tickets, investigate our codebase, build workflows, write docs, and automate anything that can be automated. If you've put serious time into AI agents and automations (**100+ hours**), this might be the most interesting job you've seen. If you haven't, it isn't for you.

What you'll own:

- **Build a scalable AI support engine** вЂ” answer customer questions, then use AI to turn each answer into knowledge-base material so the next customer gets it instantly and the question never reaches your queue again.
- **Turn founder-led onboarding into a repeatable system** вЂ” capture what makes our founder-led onboarding great in repeatable playbooks, so every customer gets that same launch whether they're the 4th this month or the 40th.
- **Nurture and grow accounts** вЂ” become the expert customers trust and own their quarterly business reviews (QBRs), turning trust into renewals and expansion.

As the function scales, there's an opportunity to build and lead a team, with the founders backing you as you grow into it.

> рџ’Ў **Developers, this is for you too.** A developer with real AI experience who also has customer-facing experience is a *perfect* candidate for this role. If you love building automations in Claude and talking to users, you're exactly who we want.

## Local

Remoto вЂ” **baseado no Brasil**, confortГЎvel com sobreposiГ§ГЈo ao fuso horГЎrio US Eastern (ET).

## Requisitos

**ObrigatГіrios:**
- **100+ hours hands-on with AI agents / automations** (Claude as your primary working tool). This is the real bar вЂ” if you haven't put serious time into AI, this role isn't for you.
- **Fluent English**, written and spoken.
- **Based in Brazil**, comfortable with US time-zone overlap.
- Hungry, organized, a strong writer, and comfortable building from scratch.

**DesejГЎveis:**
- 1вЂ“4 years in B2B SaaS customer success, account management, or a similar customer-facing role (ideal, not required вЂ” we care more about how you work than how long you've done it).
- A developer background counts: if you have real AI experience **and** customer-facing experience, you're a perfect fit even without a formal CS title.

## BenefГ­cios

- Competitive base compensation in **USD**, plus generous commission on the expansion revenue you generate
- Fully remote вЂ” work from wherever you're most productive
- 40-hour work week with flexible hours built around US Eastern Time overlap
- 11 days of paid time off + 9 Brazilian public holidays (**20 days off total**)
- All tools and subscriptions covered, including generous AI plans
- A real voice in product decisions and company direction from day one

## ContrataГ§ГЈo

**PJ** вЂ” hired and managed through **Deel** (simple, clean contracting).

## Como se candidatar

Watch a short video from our co-founder and find application details here:
рџ‘‰ **https://www.wrenly.ai/hiring/csm**
